I am responsible for financial reporting and instituted key control systems to meet the standards services of the parent company. Also as Butler in Qasr Al Sharq, a Waldorf Astoria Collection 7 Star  Palace Managed by Hilton International in Jeddah, Saudi Arabia. I gainedan extensive international experiences Training at THE INTERNATIONAL BUTLERS ACADEMY working in various international renowned five star hotels.  I personally serve various head of states and members of the royal families like, Prince Andrew of England Duke of york, Her Highness Queen Rania of Jordan, Former British Prime Minister Tony Blair and some High Ranking Military Generals, Prince and Princess of KSA 2006-2010.  Worked for TUI International Passenger Luxury Cruises all over the world as Utility staff, Buffet Runner,  Bar Waiter to Bartender in 2011 -2015. I had the great opportunity to be working as Personal travelling Butler for Sheikh Fawaz and Family , Alhokair Group of Companies in KSA 2015-2016. Plus my two years as one of the Four Personal Butler for His Royal Highness  Sheikh Tamim  bIn  Hamad Al Thani who is the current Emir of Qatar in 2017 -2019.   I am confident that my extensive experiences as a Hotel  staff would serve as an asset to a position in your organization. Thank you for your time and consideration.
